assets.intendedUse: Production Armistice Plaza whole-map authored ground surface for coherent civic stone, road/asphalt, rubble, terminal, and breach material zones.
assets.licenseNote: ChatGPT Images terrain source art mechanically cropped, background-cleaned, resized, and composited into a whole-map runtime surface with Python/Pillow packaging only; MIT-included for this project.
assets.notes: May 5 terrain-only correction: the runtime authored ground rejects the single V4 sheet as the visible driver after close-camera proof showed it reading as a giant repeated cobble floor. The accepted pack now starts from a flat safety color instead of visible low-fidelity underpaint, fills the camera-relevant floor with dense overlapping V7 prop-pad-extension terrain pieces, and uses V6 interconnected terrain plates/strips as authored emphasis. The old V2/V4 broad sheets are no longer visible pixel sources, so the walkable floor better matches the prop-grounding pads in crack thickness, rubble scale, dirt grain, and contrast. A mechanical outer-silhouette alpha mask breaks up the PNG perimeter so the visible map edge reads jagged rather than square; props remain separate runtime sprites above this ground layer.
